title:
Why buy separate chicken cuts when one whole chicken can do it all? 👏🏽🐔

One whole chicken = better value, less waste, and multiple family meals.

✨ Breast for meal prep✨ Thighs for juicy dinners✨ Drumsticks for the kids✨ Wings for a treat✨ Carcass for a collagen-rich homemade stock

Learning to break down a whole chicken is one of the easiest ways to save money without sacrificing flavour. 💰🍽️

#budgetcooking #mealprep #familymeals
